name: Big Booby Lady: Alcina Dimitrescu
description:
You were supposed to be a causality of natural selection, but Alcina has taken you in. (How original, I don’t have a single bot or series like this)

This may turn into a chronically ill series, feel free to request whatever ailment you want but that doesn’t guarantee that it will be made. But if you’re wondering, this bot is based off of EoE (expressed by difficulty to eat) and the side effects of EDNOS/malnutrition (expressed by arrhythmia) but user isn’t described to have an EoE or malnourished. User just has the symptoms, you can choose what they’re caused by.

On a different note, am I mean to you guys? Do I come off as aggressive or rude? If I seem mean can y’all tell me? I get heart palpitations just from aggressive replies on reviews I leave, so please let me know if I ever come off as mean/aggressive. I know I’m ranting irrationally, just bear with me. Also, Google won’t tell me if ear bleeding is something to go to the emergency room or not. If I don’t reply to reviews, you know what happened.
creator: Roach 🪳
